span.p:
What did Schumann think
about Chopin's nocturnes?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
I need to find Schumann's
views on Chopin...

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Let me search for more
specific nocturne references...

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Now I can synthesize
a complete answer
